name: Jumbo Electronics Qatar
message: Jumbo Electronics QatarAbout Video Home & Electronic CentreVideo Home & Electronic Centre was founded by late Mr. Jassim Mohammed Sulaiman, two of his colleagues along with first employee & co-founder Mr. C.V. Rappai in the year 1980 in Qatar.Today Video Home & Electronic Centre has over 800 employees with annual revenue of over QAR 800 Million with a CAGR of 18% for the past 10 years. It conducts business under 4 major verticals: Retail, Distribution, B2B & MEP (Jumbo Electromech Engineering, Jumbo Security Equipments & Services, Jumbo Fire Protection & Safety Engineering). The retail arm includes Jumbo Electronics as its flagship retail chain, LG Brand shops & Harman House showrooms.Video Home & Electronic Centre is the sole distributor in Qatar for some of the world’s most renowned  and favored brands like LG, Indesit, Ariston, Brother, JBL, Harman Kardon, Kyocera, Oscar, Kenwood, Morphy Richards, Maytag, Mr. Light, Mediacom, Rotpunkt, Symphony, Dometic and also some specialized brands for the MEP sector like Secutron, Bosch, Hikoki Power Tools, Interal, Siemens, Actron, Belden, Cisco etc. and it is constantly adding to this list of world class brands.It also has been providing world class office automation products from trusted brands over the years that make daily office tasks effortless with a range of office solutions from brands like Kyocera, Brother and LG that provide custom solutions for all office needs. Its strong B2B customer base includes government & semi-government institutions, private companies, contractors and consultants with whom it has built and nurtured a relationship of trust over 42 years.Video Home is supported by a state-of-the-art supply chain & logistics facilities and a capable after sales service infrastructure developed with best practices and latest technologies for efficient functioning. Its Service Centre is spread over 2200 sq meters which includes a training academy that imparts training and skill up gradation to its service staff.  Trainings are conducted in-house as well as directly by respective brands to ensure professional and quality services for all products.As a Total Solutions Provider, Video Home today is poised to expand its horizons as it continues to be a leading electronics & appliances retailer in the country. It’s strong relations with the government & private sector ensures that it’s products & services are appreciated across many major projects in hospitality, healthcare, education, real estate, retail and oil & gas sectors.Geo: Qatar - Leak size: 311 GB Archive - Contains: Files
